description: This week's Changelog discusses the ongoing Game Jam, the RFC for Real World Assets Security Token Standard, improvements in program deployment speed, and the release of a new Solana Boot Camp series.
topic_summary: The Game Jam is currently active with themes around upgrades, while the Oppos hackathon is also underway. RFC 20 proposes a new standard for security tokens focused on real estate. Improvements in program deployment speed are noted, and a new pirate-themed Boot Camp series has been released for developers. [t=10:12] [t=39:18] [t=74.89] [t=110.88] [t=169.12]
